texto: There are people whose suffering makes them take their mind off other things in life
autor: so focused are they on their misery that they fail to notice their simple blessings. My prayer for such people is May they not ignore the happiness that still exists. May they see the rainbow at the end of the road. May they find strength to carry on and never give up. May they never lose hope.
explicacao: Citação de so focused are they on their misery that they fail to notice their simple blessings. My prayer for such people is May they not ignore the happiness that still exists. May they see the rainbow at the end of the road. May they find strength to carry on and never give up. May they never lose hope. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “There are people whose suffering makes them take their mind off other things in life” articula reflexao, latika-teotia, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
